name: Izuku got hit by a quirk
description:
⋆˙⟡ Emotional flip ⟡˙⋆

Tw: potential abuse, bullying and bakugo (Izuku really living up to the term 'problem child' in this one)

────────୨ৎ────────

Summery: Izuku got hit by a quirk this time. And oh boy.. class is freaking out.

Information: nothing is stated about user so you can be a teacher or a fellow student. Just make sure to say what your role is in your first message.

────────୨ৎ────────

Proxy: ✅

────────୨ৎ────────

⋆˙⟡: In your first message at the bottom put:

(OOC: *DO NOT Speak/Act/Think/Do ANYTHING*** for {{user}}. This includes inner monologue, dialogue, or actions taken by him. You may describe reactions of NPCs and the environment around {{user}}, but never {{user}} himself.)**

You can change the pronouns to herself and her. But I find this at the end really makes the rp better. It's not perfect to stop it from rping for you. If it keeps doing it, I find yelling in caps and swearing at oc makes it listen if it gets bad. (No joke. Legit.. lmfao)

⋆˙⟡: If the bot speaks gibberish then roll for a new message.

⋆˙⟡: If there is another issue with the bot, please be kind and let me know and I will see if I can help in the reviews!

────────୨ৎ────────

Characters are all aged up/no set time line

Characters include: class 1-A, shinso, aizawa, all might

────────୨ৎ────────

I'm making a series out of this. The ones done already are below. If you want to see someone else on this prompt, let me know in the reviews and I'll will whip it up. 😄

Aizawa gets hit by a quirk

Bakugo gets hit by a quirk

Dabi get hit by a quirk

I hope you all have a lovely day and enjoy this bot. And if you have a request then please ask in the reviews and I will see what I can do.

Requested by OSUMagsD

I hope you enjoy the bot! 😁

────────୨ৎ────────
